none.justification: Correctly identifies `#ifdef CONFIG_PREEMPTION` at `kernel/sched/core.c:6875`, the close at `6987`, `config PREEMPTION` at `kernel/Kconfig.preempt:92`, and `config PREEMPT` at `:51`. It also states the v6.6 relationship correctly: `PREEMPT` selects `PREEMPT_BUILD`, which selects `PREEMPTION`.

ccodegraph.justification: It gets the guard symbol/site, both Kconfig declarations, and the indirect `PREEMPT -> PREEMPT_BUILD -> PREEMPTION` relationship right. However it incorrectly says the matching `#endif` for the `CONFIG_PREEMPTION` block is at `kernel/sched/core.c:6912`; GT says the block closes at `6987`, so the exact guard range is wrong.

codegraph.justification: Fully matches the GT: guard is `#ifdef CONFIG_PREEMPTION` at `kernel/sched/core.c:6875`, closing at `6987`, `PREEMPTION` is declared at `kernel/Kconfig.preempt:92`, and `PREEMPT` at `:51`. It correctly explains the indirect v6.6 chain through `PREEMPT_BUILD`, with `PREEMPT_RT` direct.

cbm.justification: It correctly identifies `CONFIG_PREEMPTION`, the start line `6875`, the `PREEMPTION` and `PREEMPT` Kconfig declarations, and the indirect `PREEMPT_BUILD` relationship. But it falsely places the `CONFIG_PREEMPTION` closing `#endif` around `6913` before `preempt_schedule_notrace`; GT says the guard closes at `6987`, so the exact guard range is materially wrong.
